title: Student Success Predictor
description: An end-to-end Machine Learning application that predicts student exam performance using Linear Regression. Built with Python, Pandas, and Scikit-learn, and deployed using Streamlit for real-time predictions.

title: Bangalore House Price Predictor
description: A full-stack Machine Learning project that predicts house prices using Ridge Regression. Includes a Flask backend API and a responsive frontend UI. Demonstrates end-to-end ML deployment.

title: Car Price Predictor
description: A Machine Learning application that predicts car prices using Linear Regression. Built with Flask and containerized using Docker, showing deployment and production concepts.
